title: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Overview

detail.title: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 online application form date is 9 April to 7 May 2026, as per BCECEB. Check BCECE LE 2026 form start date, last date, exam date, eligibility, fees and how to apply online.

content.text: Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 online application form date has been officially scheduled from 9 April 2026 to 7 May 2026 by the Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB). Through the Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination – Lateral Entry (BCECE LE) 2026, diploma and eligible B.Sc. holders can secure direct admission to the second year of undergraduate Engineering, Pharmacy and Para-medical courses in participating institutions across Bihar.

Here covers the BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 application form date, last date, exam date, eligibility, application fee, exam pattern and step-by-step apply online process, using verified details from the official advertisement and prospectus. It is designed to answer “Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 online application form date” quickly at the top while giving serious aspirants a complete, practical guide to BCECE LE 2026.
Download Official Notification PDF for Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry 2026: Click Here

rows: Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Lateral Entry (BCECE LE) 2026
Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB)
Lateral entry to 2nd year of Engineering, Pharmacy and Para-medical undergraduate courses in Bihar
Online only via official BCECEB website
BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 application form date (start)
BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 application form last date

sections.heading: BCECE Full Form and BCECE Lateral Entry 2026

content.text: The BCECE full form is Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination, conducted by the Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) for various professional courses in the state.

BCECE Lateral Entry (BCECE LE) is a separate entrance exam that allows eligible diploma and B.Sc. candidates to take lateral entry into the second year of undergraduate Engineering, Pharmacy and Para-medical programmes in Bihar colleges.
This route helps candidates save one academic year and continue higher studies directly from the 2nd year.

sections.heading: Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Important Dates

content.text: Use this table for date-heavy information and snippet potential.

rows: Last date to submit online application
Last date for fee payment (Net banking / Card / UPI)
Proposed date of BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 examination

content.text: For diploma and eligible B.Sc. candidates seeking Bihar engineering lateral entry admission in 2026, the relevant form is the BCECE Lateral Entry (BCECE LE) 2026 application form, not the regular first-year BCECE form.The Bihar engineering form date 2026 for lateral entry is therefore 9 April 2026 to 7 May 2026, matching the BCECE LE 2026 online registration window. Candidates targeting 2nd-year B.E./B.Tech seats through lateral entry should strictly complete their application within this period on the official BCECEB website.

sections.heading: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Application Form Date

content.text: The Bihar BCECE Lateral Entry (BCECE LE) 2026 online application form date is scheduled to start from 9 April 2026 as per the official notification. The registration window will remain open for candidates to complete all steps of the online application within the prescribed schedule.

The BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 application form is available only in online mode on the official website bceceboard.bihar.gov.in. Candidates must complete registration, fill in personal and academic details, upload photo and signature, and submit the fee to successfully submit the form.

The BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 exam date is planned for 31 May 2026 in offline OMR-based mode. Candidates should confirm the exact date, shift timing and exam centre from their admit card once it is released.

sections.heading: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Application Form Last Date

content.text: The last date for the BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 application form is 7 May 2026. Applicants should also note the separate last date for fee payment, which typically falls one day after the form submission deadline.

BCECE full form is Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination. BCECE is conducted by the Bihar Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (BCECEB) for various professional courses, and BCECE LE is the lateral entry version for second-year admissions.
Eligibility varies by stream (Engineering, Pharmacy, Para-medical) and category; always cross-check the latest prospectus.

rows: Candidate must satisfy Bihar state domicile / residency norms as specified in the prospectus
3-year Engineering Diploma in a relevant branch from a recognized institution with at least 45% aggregate marks (40% for BC/EBC/SC/ST) OR B.Sc. degree with required subjects as per prospectus
2-year Diploma in Pharmacy from a recognized institute
Relevant 2-year diploma in Para-medical disciplines as specified by BCECEB
Final-year diploma candidates (2026) are eligible, provided they pass before counselling and produce proof at the time of admission
45% aggregate for General/BC/EBC and 40% for SC/ST in diploma/B.Sc., as applicable
No upper age limit for Engineering courses

sections.heading: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Application Form – How to Apply Online

content.text: All applications must be submitted online via the official BCECEB portal; offline forms are not accepted.
Step-by-step process:

items: Visit the official website bceceboard.bihar.gov.in.
On the home page, click the “Online Portal of BCECE(LE)–2026” link.
Click on “New Registration” and read the instructions carefully before proceeding.

Complete Step-One (Registration) by entering basic details, valid email ID and mobile number; verify using the verification code sent to your mobile/email to generate a Registration Number and Password.

Log in with your Registration Number and Password, then complete Step-Two (Multi-Step Application Form): Fill Personal Information and click Save & Continue. Enter Contact Details and click Save & Continue. Provide Educational Information and click Save & Continue.
Fill Personal Information and click Save & Continue.
Enter Contact Details and click Save & Continue.
Provide Educational Information and click Save & Continue.
Upload a scanned photograph, signature and placard as per size and format specifications, then Save & Continue.
In Step-Three, check the Application Preview carefully; if needed, use “Back to Edit” to correct any entry, then agree to the declaration and click Final Submit & Proceed to Payment.
In Step-Four, pay the Examination / Counselling Fee of ₹2,200 via online payment modes such as net banking, debit/credit card or UPI (processing charges extra as applicable).
After successful payment, go to Step-Five and download the Confirmation Page and Fee Receipt; take printouts for future reference.
If necessary, use the Online Editing of Application Form facility during 10–11 May 2026 to correct permissible fields, and re-download the updated Confirmation Page.

content.text: All candidates must pay a common fee for the exam and counselling.

rows: All Categories (General / BC / EBC / SC / ST / others)
Online payment only – Net banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI (with applicable processing charges)
Examination / counselling fee is non-refundable; no refund or chargeback is allowed after successful submission and payment.

content.text: BCECE LE 2026 is conducted in offline (pen-and-paper) mode using OMR sheets, with objective multiple-choice questions.

rows: Engineering, Pharmacy, Para-medical (group-wise papers as per syllabus)
Lateral entry admission into 2nd year of B.E./B.Tech, Pharmacy and Para-medical undergraduate courses
As detailed in the official BCECE LE 2026 prospectus (candidates should follow the group-wise scheme given there)

content.text: For exact number of questions, marks per section and any negative marking, refer directly to the BCECE LE 2026 prospectus (PROS_BLE26).

The BCECEB will release the BCECE LE 2026 admit card on 23 May 2026 on the official portal. Candidates must log in with their Registration Number and Password to download the admit card, verify details such as name, photograph, exam date, time and exam centre, and print multiple copies for safety. It is mandatory to carry the printed admit card along with valid ID proof to the exam centre on 31 May 2026.

sections.heading: BCECE Lateral Entry 2026 Result and Counselling

content.text: After the exam, BCECEB will publish the BCECE LE 2026 result on bceceboard.bihar.gov.in in the form of a merit list / rank card. Counselling for lateral entry admission into second-year Engineering, Pharmacy and Para-medical courses will be held based on ranks, category and availability of seats, with instructions issued separately on the website. Candidates must attend counselling with original certificates, mark sheets, domicile and category documents, and the BCECE LE 2026 admit card and confirmation page.
